explanation: Chosen for its central role in shaping Orwell’s psyche; it carries strong emotional weight but is conceptually simple.
Represents deep emotional separation influencing his writing motives; slightly more abstract than 'lonely.'
Key to Orwell’s self-perception and motivation; emotionally heavy but straightforward in meaning.
Reflects inner drive and conflict; moderately complex due to its psychological nuance.
One of Orwell’s stated motives; emotionally charged but conceptually more philosophical.
Important to his love of language; lower emotional charge but high intellectual complexity.
A driving emotional force behind his political writing; highly charged yet broadly understandable.
Extremely strong emotional term tied to authority and oppression; very simple semantically.
Describes the involuntary urge to write; emotionally significant with moderate abstraction.
Represents imagination and lost innocence; moderately emotional and accessible.
Captures internal conflict about purpose and era; moderately complex and emotional.
Loaded political term reflecting tension in writing; emotionally charged with conceptual weight.
Central ethical concern in the essay; powerful but philosophically layered.
Conveys emotional disappointment in his own writing; strong feeling with moderate complexity.
Part of his critique of writers; moderately emotional and somewhat abstract.
Describes writing as painful and exhausting; highly emotional and easy to grasp.
Directly expresses suffering tied to writing; emotionally intense and very simple.
Metaphor for inner drive; emotionally vivid and symbolically complex.
Refers to subconscious motivation; moderately emotional and conceptually nuanced.
Core to Orwell’s purpose; emotionally charged depending on context, with moderate abstraction.
Historically and morally loaded concept; both emotionally intense and intellectually complex.
Represents lived hardship shaping his views; very emotional but conceptually simple.
Describes tone of his desired novels; moderately strong emotion with low complexity.
Contrasts suffering with pleasure in language; emotionally strong but simple.
Used to critique his own weaker writing; moderately emotional with some metaphorical depth.
